description:
Legal document in the hand of Mevorakh b. Natan. Dated: Thursday, 17 Nisan 1483 Seleucid (1172 CE). Inventory of the estate of the physician Abū l-Riḍā al-Levi, which was designated for the benefit of the orphan daughter of ʿImrān by order of "the great Rav Moshe," that is, Maimonides, who had recently been appointed head of the Jews. Also mentions the dead man's female slave named Musk. Join by S. D. Goitein. Join awaiting transcription. 

Goitein's notes say that Westminster Frag. Cairens. 25+ is another copy of this document, but the shelfmark must have changed (this should correspond to L-G Misc. 25, and nothing in the L-G Misc. folder appears to be related to this document).
tags: slaves, head of the jews, Maimonides, estate, orphans
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב מבורך ב' נתן. מתוארך: חמישי, 17 ניסן 1483 סלאוקי = 1172. מלאי עיזבון הרופא אבו אל-ריד'א הלוי, שיועד לטובת בת יתומה של עמראן בהוראת הרב הגדול משה (מיימוני). מוזכרת גם עבדת בשם מסק.
